Yes, I am doing another Conversation with him, in honor of the paperback edition of his highly engaging book [On the Edge: The Art of Risking Everything](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=0ae698a4cc2b7e3e3c56a5d3a83f39218da275af1c65dd8e2e33be505d425398&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90911&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=39257f0bd4802010da8a0ec2596e9001&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=f60fda1a5283d434b05dc1fc1d134759). Here is [the last installment of a CWT with Nate](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4879744fb9a85dcdef31ec75d2ce225ca6a9f3fbbe8f979f73b20f105c2a9920&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90911&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=d9323de955f78bf8b19e3f0e7714b83b&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9jb252ZXJzYXRpb25zd2l0aHR5bGVyLmNvbS9lcGlzb2Rlcy9uYXRlLXNpbHZlci0yLw=&email_id=f60fda1a5283d434b05dc1fc1d134759), here was [my first Conversation with Nate](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=267984b6a4a8f0b081e4d9a535927a1ddddc303af4553a19aefdbe6ec0da8db4&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90911&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=44408a2442983a50a3bc65f8b88446a3&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9jb252ZXJzYXRpb25zd2l0aHR5bGVyLmNvbS9lcGlzb2Rlcy9uYXRlLXNpbHZlci8&email_id=f60fda1a5283d434b05dc1fc1d134759).
So what should I ask him?
